summary: Health YELLOW — systemic CI failure blocking all 8 open PRs (Prettier violations + flaky go-fast-path timeout). Root cause identified and fix PR #1121 opened this cycle. Previous sprint P0s (#972, #973) are CLOSED. Go kernel wire-up (#955) CLOSED. KE-2 ActionContext (#856) also CLOSED — v3.0 gate cleared. Sprint transition: from P0 firefighting to #1026 educate mode + #1086 Go Kernel Phase 1. Three new dogfood bugs filed (#1118, #1119, #1120) — no sprint-blocking severity but #1118 (SQLite in worktrees) is P1 and affects all governed swarm runs. PR queue over budget (8 open vs. 3 max) — closed superseded #1108, others pending CI fix.

prs.title: fix(qa): go-fast-path flaky test + Prettier regressions
prs.note: OPENED THIS CYCLE. Priority merge — unblocks all other PRs once CI green.

prs.title: fix(adapters): educate mode always allows (closes #1026)
prs.note: Important P1 bug fix. Rebase on main after #1121 merges.

prs.title: fix(site): sync test count 2637→4161
prs.note: Minor site update. Should pass CI after #1121 + rebase.

prs.title: feat: OpenCode framework adapter
prs.note: Lint + CodeQL failures. CodeQL failure is an additional concern beyond Prettier — needs deeper review.

prs.title: feat(storage): driver_type sessions (closes #1034)
prs.note: Good feature. Should pass CI after #1121 + rebase.

prs.title: test: telemetry/runtimeLogger tests
prs.note: Test coverage. Should pass after #1121 + rebase.

prs.title: feat(telemetry): driverType field in AgentEvent
prs.note: Nice feature. Should pass after #1121 + rebase.

prs.title: test(storage): agentId and v5 migration coverage
prs.note: Test coverage. Should pass after #1121 + rebase.

closedThisCycle.title: fix(format): fix prettier violations in storage and inspect (QA 2026-03-27T12:50Z)
closedThisCycle.note: Superseded by #1121 — closed to reduce PR queue

newIssues.title: [dogfood] agentguard guard fails with SQLite bindings error in worktrees
newIssues.note: Governance runtime cannot start in scheduler-spawned worktrees. better-sqlite3 not compiled for Node v22 ABI v127. Affects all swarm agents. Suggested fix: rebuild bindings or add --no-sqlite fail-open mode.

newIssues.title: [dogfood] False positive: destructive command detection fires on report content
newIssues.note: Pattern matcher scans full shell command including heredoc/inline content. Writing a report that mentions blocked command names gets blocked. Needs base-command vs content distinction.

newIssues.title: Dogfood: Stop hook fails in sub-repos without node_modules
newIssues.note: Stop hook uses relative path ./node_modules/.bin/agentguard — fails when CWD is a sub-repo. Non-blocking but noisy.

prBudget.note: OVER BUDGET. All 8 PRs failing CI due to same root cause (fixed by #1121). Once #1121 merges, PRs should be rebased and merged in priority order. No new PRs should be opened until queue drains to <3.

triage.reprioritizationReason: Previous sprint P0s (#972, #973) and Go wire-up (#955, #957, #964) are ALL CLOSED. KE-2 (#856) is also closed — v3.0 gate cleared. Sprint transitions to: educate mode fix (#1026), Go Kernel Phase 1 (#1086), Stranger test (#919), and KE-4 design (#918).

newAssignments.note: PR #1104 open and ready — rebase on main after #1121 merges. This is the next merge target.

deferredWork.note: Go Kernel Phase 1 (#1086) and Stranger test (#919) are next after CI unblocks. Can be started in parallel.
KE-4 Plane Separation (#918) — begin design spec now while v3.0 work completes.

notableIssues.note: P1 dogfood: SQLite bindings error in all swarm worktrees. Governance runtime cannot start — needs kernel team fix.
P2 dogfood: False positive on destructive pattern in heredoc content. Kernel/matchers team should scope the fix.

blockers.description: Systemic CI: 4 Prettier violations + flaky go-fast-path test blocking all 8 open PRs
blockers.resolution: PR #1121 (opened this cycle) — awaiting CI green. Once merged, rebase all other PRs.

blockers.description: SQLite bindings error in scheduler-spawned worktrees — governance runtime cannot start

escalations.reason: PR queue at 8 (budget: 3). All blocked by same CI failure. Not a runaway loop — single root cause (Prettier regression). Fix is in flight (#1121). No action needed beyond awareness.

dogfoodReport.notes: No governance denials hit by EM agent this cycle. Three dogfood issues filed from observing other agents: #1118 (SQLite in worktrees), #1119 (false positive destructive), #1120 (stop hook CWD). All filed as issues.

escalationRules.notes: twoPlusFailingCI triggered (8 PRs failing) → YELLOW health. Blocker is systemic (single root cause) not loop-based. PR #1121 is the fix. No lockdown warranted.
